vocab.example: Our revenue grew by ten percent last month.
vocab.example_vi: Doanh thu tháng trước của chúng ta tăng mười phần trăm.

vocab.example: The profit margin is a bit lower than expected.
vocab.example_vi: Biên lợi nhuận thấp hơn dự kiến một chút.

vocab.example: Our expenses went up because of higher shipping costs.
vocab.example_vi: Chi phí của chúng ta tăng lên vì phí vận chuyển cao hơn.

vocab.example: This is the strongest quarter we've had this year.
vocab.example_vi: Đây là quý mạnh nhất của năm nay.

vocab.example: Let's go through the figures on this slide.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng ta cùng xem qua các số liệu trên slide này nhé.

vocab.example: Sales are up compared to the same month last year.
vocab.example_vi: Doanh số tăng so với cùng kỳ năm ngoái.

vocab.example: Our forecast for next quarter looks positive.
vocab.example_vi: Dự báo cho quý tới trông khá tích cực.

vocab.example: I want to highlight one number on this slide.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi muốn nêu bật một con số trên slide này.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: Good afternoon, everyone. Let's go through the figures for this quarter.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: Sure, please start with revenue. How does it look compared to last quarter?

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: Revenue is up twelve percent compared to last quarter, which is great news.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: That's good. What about the profit margin? I heard expenses were higher.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: You're right. Expenses rose because of shipping costs, so the profit margin dropped slightly.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: I see. Can you highlight what's driving those extra expenses?

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: Mostly fuel prices. But our forecast for next quarter still looks positive overall.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: Good to hear. Thanks for walking us through the figures, Minh.

questions.q: How did revenue change compared to last quarter?
Why did the profit margin drop slightly?
What does Minh say mainly caused the extra expenses?

shadowing: Let's go through the figures for this quarter before we move to the next slide.
Revenue is up compared to the same period last year.
Our profit margin dropped slightly because of higher expenses this quarter.
I want to highlight one important number on this slide.
Our forecast for next quarter still looks positive, even with rising costs.
